australian_relation: Public St John Ambulance NT newsletter in Territory Stories naming ghost stories attached to the old Palmerston Centre.
coordinate_evidence_note: Vollie News names the old Palmerston Centre and Rolyat Street centre in the ghost-story section; exact former-centre point was not used, so the representative flag uses the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Palmerston town result.
evidence_summary: Vollie News Thursday 26th May 2011 included "Ghosts in the old Palmerston Centre" and "Another ghost story". Peter Poole asked whether the old Palmerston Centre was haunted and said he never had trouble sleeping there. Dawn Bat recalled hearing stories about the "ghosts" at Palmerston Centre when she was Cadet Superintendent, and the item referred to stories about the ghost mainly from Comms and the old Rolyat Street centre.
publication_or_organisation: Vollie News, 26 May 2011; St John Ambulance Australia (NT)
